notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.15.12 Field Derotation in Planetary Stacker. Alt/AZ Field Rotation Calculations of targets in WIMS. Saturation adjuster in Narrowband Ingration tool  V1.15.11 Major Installer update for Linux Users. This is a shell installer now to fetch the latest SASpro, create shortcuts, add SASpro to the library, create update scripts, etc. Updating from SASpro going forward will be a full automatic update. Other updates: STacking suite interactive flat update and other UX updates.   V1.15.10  Major UX update for MacOS users.  Tool UI's should now stay on top even if you click off of them.  Other updates: major memory optimizations in clone stamp and blemish blaster.  Refresh dropdowns button in Narrowband Integration  V1.15.0–1.15.9 New tools: Dither Analysis, Narrowband Integration.  Extra Features: Planetary Stacker, Hyperbolic Stretch, and Luminosity blending in Layers. Major updates to the Stacking Suite (comet stacking, L recombination, execution monitor, session persistence), PDF support, macOS Homebrew distribution, Python 3.13/3.14 support, and Aberration Remover GPU improvements. Numerous bug fixes across GHS, WIMI, hardware acceleration install, and more.
